metadata.name: API Center Service Workspaces
metadata.description: This module deploys an API Center Service Workspace.
Required. The name of the environment.
Required. The title of the environment.
Required. The kind of environment.
Optional. The description of the environment.
Optional. The custom metadata defined for API catalog entities.
Optional. Server information of the environment.
Optional. Onboarding information for the environment.
Required. The name of the API.
Required. The title of the API.
Required. The kind of API.
Optional. The description of the API.
Optional. Short description of the API.
Optional. The custom metadata defined for API catalog entities.
Optional. External documentation for the API.
Optional. The contacts for the API.
Optional. The license information for the API.
Optional. The terms of service for the API.
Optional. The versions for the API.
Optional. The deployments for the API.
Required. The name of the API source.
Optional. Indicates if the specification should be imported along with metadata.
Optional. The target environment name. If not provided a new environment will be created.
Optional. The target lifecycle stage for imported APIs.
Required. Configuration for importing APIs from Azure API Management.
Optional. The base runtime URIs for this deployment.
Required. The resource ID of the Azure API Management instance.
Optional. The resource ID of the managed identity that has access to the API Management instance. If not provided, system-assigned identity is used and granted Api Management Service Reader role.
Optional. The name of the contact.
Optional. The email of the contact.
Optional. The URL of the contact.
Required. The name of the deployment.
Optional. The title of the deployment.
Optional. The description of the deployment.
Required. The target environment name of the deployment.

Required. The deployed definition name.

Optional. The developer portal URIs.
Optional. Onboarding instructions.
Optional. The management portal URIs.
Optional. The type of server that represents the environment.
Required. The URL pointing to the documentation.
Optional. The title of the documentation.
Optional. The description of the documentation.
Optional. SPDX license identifier. Mutually exclusive with url.
Optional. The name of the license.
Optional. URL pointing to the license details. Mutually exclusive with identifier.
Required. URL pointing to the terms of service.
Required. The name of the version.
Required. The title of the version.
Required. The lifecycle stage of the version.
Required. The name of the definition.
Required. The title of the definition.
Optional. The description of the definition.
Optional. The definitions to create for the version.
Required. The name of the parent API Center service.
Required. The name of the workspace.
Required. The title of the workspace.
Optional. The description of the workspace.
Optional. The environments to create in the workspace.
Optional. The APIs to create in the workspace.
Optional. The API sources to create in the workspace for importing APIs from external sources.

metadata.name: API Center Service Workspace API Sources
metadata.description: This module deploys an API Center Service Workspace API Source for importing APIs from external sources like Azure API Management.
Required. The resource ID of the Azure API Management instance.
Optional. The resource ID of the managed identity that has access to the API Management instance. If not provided, system-assigned identity is used and granted Api Management Service Reader role.
Conditional. The name of the parent API Center service. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Conditional. The name of the parent workspace. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Required. The name of the API source.
Optional. Indicates if the specification should be imported along with metadata.
Optional. The target environment name. If not provided a new environment will be created.
Optional. The target lifecycle stage for imported APIs.
Required. Configuration for importing APIs from an Azure API Management instance.
Required. The name of the API Management service to assign the role on.
Required. The principal ID of the identity to grant the API Management Service Reader role to.
The name of the API source.
The resource ID of the API source.
The name of the resource group the API source was created in.
The name of the workspace.
The resource ID of the workspace.
The name of the resource group the workspace was created in.
